system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan_get4","body":"
CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_DINHMUC_GOVAN_GET4]
(
    @masp nvarchar(200)
)
AS

DECLARE @NGUYENLIEU TABLE
(
    nguyenlieu NVARCHAR(50),
    nhom NVARCHAR(50)
)

INSERT INTO @NGUYENLIEU(nguyenlieu, nhom)
SELECT nguyenlieu, nhom 
FROM tr_nhom_nguyenlieu
GROUP BY nguyenlieu, nhom

SELECT A.masp, A.stt, A.chitiet, A.nguyenlieu
    , A.dayy_tc, A.rong_tc, A.dai_tc
    , soluong_tc = A.soluong_tc 
    , dayy_sc = CASE WHEN C.nhom <> 'VAN' THEN A.dayy_tc + 1 ELSE A.dayy_tc END
    , rong_sc = CASE WHEN C.nhom <> 'VAN' THEN (CASE WHEN A.rong_tc < 61 THEN A.rong_tc + 1 ELSE 61 END) ELSE A.rong_tc END
    , dai_sc = CASE WHEN C.nhom <> 'VAN' THEN (CASE WHEN A.rong_tc < 61 THEN A.dai_tc + 8 ELSE A.dai_tc + 20 END) ELSE A.dai_tc END 
    , soluong_sc = (CASE WHEN C.nhom <> 'VAN' THEN (CASE WHEN A.rong_tc < 61 THEN A.soluong_tc ELSE CEILING(((A.rong_tc + 3) * A.soluong_tc) / 61) END) ELSE A.soluong_tc END)
INTO #DINHMUCGO
FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan A LEFT JOIN @NGUYENLIEU C ON A.nguyenlieu = C.nguyenlieu
WHERE ISNULL(A.nguyenlieu, '') NOT IN ('', '0')
    --AND ISNULL(A.nguyenlieu, '') NOT IN ('', '0', 'PB', 'PU', 'LVB', N'VÁN ÉP', 'MDF', 'LVL', N'XI MĂNG', 'PLYWOOD', 'LVD')
    AND A.dayy_tc > 0
    AND A.masp = @masp

SELECT A.*
    , dai_sc2 = CASE WHEN dai_sc % 50 > 0 THEN dai_sc + 50-(dai_sc % 50) ELSE dai_sc END
    --, cumchitiet = dbo.GetNameBySTT(A.masp, SUBSTRING(A.stt, 1, 1))
    , B.tensp, B.hehang, B.customer
INTO #RESULTS
FROM #DINHMUCGO A 
    INNER JOIN tr_sanpham B ON A.masp = B.masp
WHERE B.active = 1
    
-----------------------------------
SELECT A.*,
    m2_tc = (((dai_tc * rong_tc) + (dayy_tc * dai_tc)) * 2 * soluong_tc)/1000000,
    m3_tc = (dayy_tc*rong_tc*dai_tc*soluong_tc)/1000000000,

    m2_sc = (((dai_sc * rong_sc) + (dayy_sc * dai_sc)) * 2 * soluong_sc)/1000000,
    m3_sc = (dayy_sc*rong_sc*dai_sc*soluong_sc)/1000000000,

    m2_sc2 = (((dai_sc2 * rong_sc) + (dayy_sc * dai_sc2)) * 2 * soluong_sc)/1000000,
    m3_sc2 = (dayy_sc*rong_sc*dai_sc2*soluong_sc)/1000000000
FROM #RESULTS A

DROP TABLE #DINHMUCGO
DROP TABLE #RESULTS
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_nhom_nguyenlieu","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
